name: Chicken Rice Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté onions and garlic in butter until tender.
2. Stir in chicken, chili powder, 1/4 cup broth, and 3/4 cup of picante sauce. Heat through; set aside.
3. In a medium saucepan, bring rice and remaining broth to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes. Stir in the remaining picante sauce; cover and simmer for an additional 5-10 minutes or until rice is tender.
4. Stir the cooked rice into the chicken mixture, then add olives and 2 cups of cheese.
5. Spoon about 1 cup of filling off-center onto each tortilla.
6. Fold the sides and ends over the filling, then roll up. Arrange in two ungreased 13x9x2-inch pans.
7. Sprinkle with remaining cheese. Cover and bake at 375 degrees for 10-15 minutes or until heated through.
8. Garnish with picante sauce and additional cheese.
